strength: You lead the reader through the whole argument with real confidence. The introduction sets out your role and position at once, and every argument backs its point with a concrete case from the workplace.

observations.text: Each argument brings a claim, a reason and an example together, which is exactly what makes the case convincing.
observations.quote: for example the sorting of delivery notes, which three colleagues do every morning

observations.text: Your signposting words make the structure easy to follow from the first line to the last.
observations.quote: Most importantly, if we help to shape the rules for these tools

nextStep: In your next comment, give your final own argument the most space of all, so your strongest point lands last and stays with the reader.
practice: Take your conclusion and add one sentence that looks ahead, for example what should happen in the first month after the tools arrive.
